overall.description: A first-person perspective ride on the NCART elevated cable car system in Cyberpunk 2077's Night City. The journey traverses dense urban canyons between high-rise buildings, passing neon advertisements including a prominent Tyger Claws sign, stopping briefly at an NCART station, then continuing through commercial and highway districts with expansive views of the city's futuristic infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated transit corridor between high-rise buildings

agents.ego_description: riding the NCART cable car through dense urban canyon, observing building facades and advertisements

entered.detail: large purple advertisement billboard featuring muscular figure with text SET SAIL FOR FLAVOR
tall modern building with reflective glass facade and horizontal teal accent stripes
multi-story residential building with balconies and grid-patterned windows

segments.scene_description: The cable car journey begins moving through a narrow urban canyon between high-rise buildings. A prominent purple SET SAIL advertisement is visible on the left, while modern glass and concrete towers flank both sides of the transit corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit corridor above commercial street with gang territory signage

events.description: large red Tyger Claws neon sign illuminates the scene with crimson glow
cable car begins decelerating as it approaches NCART station platform
cable car comes to complete stop at NCART station platform

agents.ego_description: riding through Tyger Claws territory while observing street traffic below, then slowing to a stop at the station platform

entered.detail: large bright red neon sign with tiger graphic and TYGER CLAWS text in English and Japanese characters
urban street visible below with moving vehicle traffic and illuminated storefronts
transit station platform with concrete flooring, safety barriers, and NCART signage

segments.scene_description: The cable car passes a prominent red Tyger Claws neon sign that bathes the scene in crimson light, revealing the street traffic below. The car then slows and stops at an NCART station platform featuring a service desk and monitors.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated transit through mixed commercial district with curved architectural elements

events.description: cable car accelerates and departs from NCART station platform

agents.ego_description: departing the station and continuing the elevated journey past commercial signage and distinctive curved building structures

entered.detail: red neon sign for KABAYAN FOODS restaurant mounted on building facade
distinctive curved architectural railing structure with metallic finish attached to building exterior
vertical digital billboard displaying woman in black outfit with advertisement text

segments.scene_description: Accelerating away from the station, the cable car passes the Kabayan Foods neon sign and various commercial billboards. The route features distinctive curved architectural elements and metal railings as it winds between buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated transit overlooking highway interchange and parking infrastructure

events.description: transit corridor opens to reveal expansive highway interchange and monorail infrastructure

agents.ego_description: continuing the cable car ride with panoramic views of highway interchanges, parking structures, and distant skyscrapers

entered.detail: multi-level highway system with orange structural supports and moving vehicle traffic
elevated monorail track system running parallel to the cable car line with green support structures
multi-level parking structure with distinctive teal and orange color scheme
tall building with distinctive green-tinted facade and horizontal window strips
large vertical red billboard with white Japanese text and graphic design

segments.scene_description: The environment opens up to reveal a sprawling highway interchange with multiple levels of traffic. The cable car passes a distinctive green office tower and large parking structures, with monorail tracks running parallel to the route.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow urban canyon that transitions from a corporate corridor into a vibrant neon-lit transit hub. It begins by gliding between towering glass and concrete skyscrapers, passing a prominent purple SET SAIL advertisement on the left. As the cable car advances, the cool tones of the architecture shift into a deep crimson glow upon passing a large Tyger Claws neon sign that illuminates the street traffic far below. The scene then slows as the camera approaches an NCART station, finally coming to a halt beside a platform equipped with monitors and a service desk.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a dense urban corridor of neon advertisements into an expansive view of the city's sprawling transportation infrastructure. It begins by accelerating away from a station, gliding past the Kabayan Foods neon sign and various commercial billboards while winding between buildings along curved architectural elements and metal railings. As the cable car moves forward, the tight urban canyon opens up to reveal a massive, multi-level highway interchange filled with traffic. The scene then expands further, passing a distinctive green office tower and large parking structures while monorail tracks run parallel to the route.
